summary: "On 2026-06-20, Google News RSS headlines described a temple roof or slab collapse in Maharashtra's Parbhani district. Frozen source notes:
- This case was selected as a new record rather than a repair: repo search did not find any existing Parbhani / temple-roof-collapse case file.
- The frozen source set is headline-level only because the Google News RSS items were the most stable accessible snapshot in this environment.
- The RSS cluster captured multiple conflicting casualty headlines, so deaths and injuries remain null.

Evidence notes:
- The Hindu: "At least three dead as slab of temple collapses in Maharashtra's Parbhani; rescue ops. under way"
- NDTV: "4 Killed As Temple Roof Collapses In Maharashtra's Parbhani"
- India Today: "6 feared dead as roof collapses at Maharashtra temple; 40 pilgrims trapped"
- The Times of India: "7 dead, 30 injured after under-construction temple roof collapses in Maharashtra's Parbhani district"
- Deccan Herald: "Four killed as temple roof collapses in Maharashtra's Parbhani"
- ETV Bharat: "Many Devotees Feared Dead After Roof Of Temple Collapses In Maharashtra"

Conflict note:
- Public reporting conflicted on the casualty total, so this draft keeps deaths and injuries null rather than guessing a number.
- No named accused, arrests, or compensation reporting were identified in the frozen sources used for this draft.
